返回本批次

Iguanaworks 已关闭，我们的产品不再销售

Iguanaworks has closed and our products are no longer sold

iguanaworks.net 作者 ripe 分数 95 评论 21 2026/04/05 21:18
打开 HN 原帖 打开原始文章

中文摘要

  1. 用于发送和接收红外的 USB 设备：让您的计算机向您的 DVR 发送红外信号；接收来自遥控器的红外信号。可在 Linux 和 Windows 下运行。我们的标准 USB 红外收发器可以发送和接收红外 (IR) 信号。它有 3 种不同的变体。所有版本通用：
  2. 接收标准 38 kHz 红外信号 以（25 – 125 kHz 载波频率）传输红外代码 USB 设备在 Linux 和 Windows 下工作
  3. 三个版本之间的区别在于 IR 的传输和接收方式：
  4. 双插座：包含两个立体声 3.5 毫米插孔，用于连接有线红外发射器（也称为发射器）。每个插孔可控制两个独立的发射通道，总共可实现 4 个独立的红外发送通道。要使用此设备传输红外线，每个通道需要一个我们的红外线发射器。要每个插槽使用两个通道，您需要一个立体声->单声道适配器。设备具有一个板载接收单元。插座接收： 1 个立体声 3.5 毫米插孔用于连接有线红外发射器，1 个立体声 3.5 毫米插孔用于连接有线接收器。
  5. 发射通道

Original Summary

  1. USB device to send and receive IR: have your computer send IR signals to your DVR; receive IR signals from a remote control. Works under Linux and Windows. Our standard USB IR Transceiver can send and receive infra-red (IR) signals. It comes in 3 different variations. Common to all versions:
  2. Receive Standard 38 kHz IR Signals Transmit IR Codes at (25 – 125 kHz carrier frequency) USB device works under Linux and Windows
  3. The difference between the three version are how IR is transmitted and received:
  4. Dual Socket: Contains two stereo 3.5mm jacks for connecting wired IR emitters (also called blasters). Each jack can control two independent transmit channels, enabling a total of 4 independent IR sending channels. To transmit IR using this device, you need one of our IR Emitters per channel. To use two channels per socket, you need a stereo->mono adapter. Device has one on-board receive unit. Socket Receive: One stereo 3.5mm jack for connecting wired IR emitters and one stereo 3.5mm jack for connecting a wired receiver.
  5. Transmit Channels

评论（默认中文）

rlam2x51 2026/04/05 22:50
Home Assistant* 几天前推出了对红外线的支持。不确定继续经营一段时间是否是一个好主意，看看家庭助理社区是否会促进销售。

我个人对红外发送器感兴趣，它可以让我的旧 Hifi 设置变得更智能。

* https://www.home-assistant.io/blog/2026/04/01/release-20264/

Home Assistant* introduced support for infrared a few days ago. Not sure if it would be a good idea to stay in business for a bit longer and see if the Home Assistant community boost the sales.

I am personally interested in an IR Sender to make my old Hifi Setup smarter.

* https://www.home-assistant.io/blog/2026/04/01/release-20264/

tclancy 2026/04/05 23:15
是的，同一艘船，我刚刚开始考虑在这个空间为 HA 寻找一个小型、便宜的设备。
Yes, same exact boat, I was just starting to think about looking for a small, cheap device in this space for HA.

spl757 2026/04/06 04:20
很多年前，我在 mythtv DVR 中使用了 Flirc，效果非常好。 https://flirc.tv/

编辑：我使用了接收器，但他们确实制作了遥控器。它看起来很酷，但我没有这方面的经验。

I used a Flirc many years ago for my mythtv DVR and it worked great. https://flirc.tv/

edit: I used the receiver, but they do make a remote. It looks cool but I have no experience with it.

在 HN 中查看
rlam2x51 2026/04/06 00:52
如果你找到了请告诉我！我想等几个月，让经验丰富的智能家居人士铺平道路。
Let me know if you find one! I wanted to wait for a few months to let the experienced smart homers pave the way.
在 HN 中查看
Aurornis 2026/04/05 22:25
看到某人的小企业倒闭真是令人遗憾，但这些产品面临着既极其利基又非常简单的困境。有人费了一番功夫才找到了一个不错的加密狗外壳，并在上面进行了一些打印，但除此之外，任何有一点 PCB 经验的人都可以在一天内复制它的硬件。如果这些只是从中国的一家仿制药制造商采购并且他们要求定制印刷，我不会感到惊讶。

如果有需求，这将是一个很好的项目，适合有人制作并准备构建 PCB，您可以从 OSH Park 订购，甚至是一个完整的项目，您可以让 JLC 构建和填充。

Sad to see someone’s small business close, but these products are in a difficult position of being both extremely niche and very simple. Someone went to some effort to source a nice dongle enclosure and do some printing on it, but beyond that the hardware is something that anyone with a little PCB experience could replicate it in a day. I wouldn’t be surprised if these were just sourced from a generic manufacturer in China and they asked for custom printing.

If there’s demand this would be a good project for someone to make and have ready to build PCBs you could order from OSH Park or even a fully project that you could have JLC build and populate.

在 HN 中查看
analog31 2026/04/06 01:12
我有一家小公司，为音乐家制造小工具：想想效果踏板之类的东西。我发布了我的原理图，共享了 PCB 文件，甚至主动向您提供一些难以获得的零件。有些人已经构建了自己的产品，并在有关我的产品的网络论坛主题中分享了他们的结果。

很少有人上钩。我认为我们技术人员高估了人们制造东西的能力和倾向。即使大多数程序员也不想焊接。他们可能仍然倾向于技术，但希望参与更高层次的活动：购买基本的东西并将其用作更复杂的东西的基础。

I have a tiny business that makes a gadget for musicians: Think something like an effects pedal. I publish my schematics, have shared PCB files, and even offer to give you some of the parts that are hard to get. A few people have built their own, and share their results in web forum threads about my product.

Very few people have taken the bait. I think we techies over-estimate the ability and inclination of people to make something. Even most programmers don’t want to solder. They may still be technically inclined, but want to be involved at a higher level: Buying the basic stuff and using it as a basis for even more elaborate things.

在 HN 中查看
StayTrue 2026/04/06 03:08
如果您向我提供我想要的工具的原理图和 PCB 设计，我可能/更/倾向于给您钱只是为了支持您。与我的 DIY 能力或兴趣无关（我也设计和销售电子产品）。
If you offered me schematics and PCB designs for a tool I desired, I might be /more/ inclined to give you money just to support you. Nothing to do with my ability or interest in DIY (I also design and sell electronics).
在 HN 中查看
The_SamminAter 2026/04/06 05:14
我喜欢学习和构建这类东西（加上一些音乐家朋友，他们永远不会拥有太多的小工具）。您愿意分享一个链接吗？

注意：如果您不想创建自己的链接，您也可以发送电子邮件至 <我的用户名>0_AT_protonmail_._com

I love learning from and building that type of thing (plus have some musician friends who can never have too many gadgets). Would you be willing to share a link?

Note: if you don’t want to create a link to yourself, you could also email me at <my username>0_AT_protonmail_._com

在 HN 中查看
charcircuit 2026/04/06 01:19
>我认为我们技术人员高估了人们创造东西的能力和倾向。

但这从来不是担心。担心的是竞争对手会削弱你的竞争力，因为他们不需要收回研发费用。

>I think we techies over-estimate the ability and inclination of people to make something.

But that was never the worry. The worry is a competitor undercutting you because they do not have to recoup R&D.

在 HN 中查看
clbrmbr 2026/04/06 03:09
克服这个问题的一些技巧是社区、品牌、仅适用于官方版本的应用程序（很难实现和悲伤），以及更加利基。
A few tricks to beat this are community, brand, an app that only works with the official version (hard to pull off and sad), and going more niche.
在 HN 中查看
justsomehnguy 2026/04/06 04:50
> 我认为我们技术人员高估了人们制造东西的能力和倾向。

如果你把“我们技术人员”换成“大多数人”（尤其是“那些在生活中没有亲手做过一件事的人”），什么都不会改变。

> I think we techies over-estimate the ability and inclination of people to make something.

If you replace 'we techies' with 'most folks' (and especially with 'folks who didn't do a thing with their hands in thei$ lives') nothing would change.

在 HN 中查看
antonvs 2026/04/06 00:14
这家公司和产品线推出近 20 年前（2007 年），此后似乎没有太大变化。对于这样的事情来说，这已经是相当长的时间了。如果业主希望业务继续下去（也许他们没有），那么一些多元化可以相对容易地实现这一点。
This company and product line launched nearly 20 years ago (2007) and doesn’t seem to have changed much since. That’s quite a long time for something like this. If the owners had wanted the business to continue (perhaps they didn’t), some diversification could have achieved that relatively easily.
在 HN 中查看
altairprime 2026/04/06 02:45
你在这里的假设是，他们希望它继续赚钱，而不是（例如）通过关闭它来应对 HA 宣布的新订单涌入。也许工作收入来源是自愿终止而不是被饿死？
Your assumption here is that they wanted it to continue making money, rather than (for example) reacting to the influx of new orders from HA’s announcement by shutting it down. Perhaps a working source of revenue is being voluntarily terminated rather than having starved to death?

aeonik 2026/04/05 23:39
好吧，该死，直到现在我才知道这一点，而且我实际上可以使用它。

还有其他选择吗？

Well damn, I didn't know about this until now, and I could actually use one.

Is there any alternative?

toast0 2026/04/06 01:19
我在微软的 Windows Media Center 远程接收器和 lirc 方面运气不错。尽管它们的工作原理并不相同。我得到的第一个比后来的更容易使用......

对 atsc 3 和媒体环境的失望导致我放弃了我的 HTPC。

I've had reasonable luck with microsoft's windows media center remote receivers and lirc. Although they don't all work the same. The first one I got was easier to use than later ones...

And frustation with atsc 3 and the media landscape led to me abandoning my htpcs.

tomjuggler 2026/04/06 02:11
噢，我有其中之一。 10多年后它仍然有效！

也许这就是发生的事情，每个需要的人都买了，我们不需要升级

Awww I have one of those. It still works after more than 10 years!

Maybe that's what happened, everyone who needed one bought and we don't need an upgrade

在 HN 中查看
teddyh 2026/04/05 23:05
我猜测现代硬件都是由侵犯隐私的应用程序控制的，通过公司的服务器进行通信。
I’m guessing that modern hardware are all controlled by privacy-invading apps, communicating via the company’s servers.
在 HN 中查看
buckle8017 2026/04/05 22:14
想必这已经没有多大用处了。

现在大多数遥控器似乎都是射频遥控器，而不是红外遥控器。

Presumably there just isn't that much use for that anymore.

Most remotes seem to be RF not ir these days.

在 HN 中查看
ovi256 2026/04/05 22:21
特别是考虑到硬件没有护城河，而且全球速卖通上有无数的红外收发器。这不是一个好的市场。
Especially given the hardware has no moat and there are a zillion IR transceivers on Aliexpress. It's not a good market.
在 HN 中查看
